name: Staged Dataset Query
summary: In-process filter/project/group/aggregate/order/limit query engine for staged API data with pluggable storage adapter.

source.notes: Extracted from Analytics staged-dataset-query action. Core is dependency-free with storage adapter interface.

caveats: In-memory storage is for testing only; implement StagedDatasetStorage interface for production persistence.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for SQL-backed datasets with existing query infrastructure.
